title: Deterministic Infra for Non-Deterministic AI Agents - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta Superintelligence Labs discusses the infrastructure gap between modern LLM-powered AI agents and legacy deterministic microservice platforms. He covers control plane requirements including orchestration, observability, retries, safety guardrails, and elastic compute patterns needed for reliable production agent systems.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs maps the infrastructure gap between LLM-powered agents and legacy deterministic microservice platforms, arguing that non-deterministic agents need a purpose-built control plane. The talk details that control plane's requirements: orchestration, observability, retries, safety guardrails, and elastic compute patterns. It also covers error handling, reliability, and tenant isolation as conditions for running agent systems in production.
